# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

name: Allow Remote Development Team Access

resource_group: <resource_group_name>

security_rules:
  - name: RDP
    protocol: Tcp
    source_address_prefix: 0.0.0.0/0
    destination_port_range: 3389
    access: Allow
  - name: SSH
    protocol: Tcp
    source_address_prefix: 0.0.0.0/0
    destination_port_range: 22
    access: Allow
  - name: HTTP
    protocol: Tcp
    source_address_prefix: 0.0.0.0/0
    destination_port_range: 80
    access: Allow
  - name: HTTPS
    protocol: Tcp
    source_address_prefix: 0.0.0.0/0
    destination_port_range: 443
    access: Allow
